mapper.select: select id, flow_name, apply_dept_id, apply_dept_name, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xf_approve_flow_config where id = #{id}

select id, flow_name, apply_dept_id, apply_dept_name, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xf_approve_flow_config
and flow_name like concat('%', #{flowName}, '%')
and apply_dept_name like concat('%', #{applyDeptName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id desc

select id, flow_name, apply_dept_id, apply_dept_name, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xf_approve_flow_config where apply_dept_id = #{applyDeptId} and status = '0' limit 1
select id, flow_config_id, stage_no, stage_name, stage_type, parallel_mode from xf_approve_flow_stage where flow_config_id = #{id} order by stage_no asc
select id, stage_id, approve_dept_id, approve_dept_name from xf_approve_flow_stage_dept where stage_id = #{id} order by id asc
mapper.delete:
delete from xf_approve_flow_config where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into xf_approve_flow_stage(flow_config_id, stage_no, stage_name, stage_type, parallel_mode) values
(#{item.flowConfigId}, #{item.stageNo}, #{item.stageName}, #{item.stageType}, #{item.parallelMode})

insert into xf_approve_flow_stage_dept(stage_id, approve_dept_id, approve_dept_name) values
(#{item.stageId}, #{item.approveDeptId}, #{item.approveDeptName})
